scripts.ts-gen: rm -rf ../frontend/contracts/core/v1 ../frontend/contracts/observer/v1 && bunx openapi-typescript-codegen --input core/v1/openapi.yaml --output ../frontend/contracts/core/v1 --client fetch --name core --useOptions && bunx openapi-typescript-codegen --input observer/v1/openapi.yaml --output ../frontend/contracts/observer/v1 --client fetch --name observer --useOptions
